summary: Audience recording with modest fidelity – the best among a weak batch but still far from great
review: The sole reviewer notes that this is an audience tap and admits the sound isn’t particularly good, though it edges out other pulls from the same night. No musical performance details are provided, so listeners should temper expectations about both audio clarity and show quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review mentioning poor sound quality and no comments on the performance; rating reflects a low‑quality recording with unknown musical merit.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says there isn’t a great sounding pull from this night, indicating muffled/low‑fidelity audio despite being the best of several audience recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No comments on set structure or pacing were provided.
